Grayscale Dogecoin Trust ETF Accred Inv ( (GDOG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Grayscale Investments has clarified its position regarding the use of cashtags and third-party content on X, formerly known as Twitter.   • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Valorem Resources ( (TSE:AGC) ) has shared an announcement.

Avanti Gold Corp. is making rapid strides towards launching exploration activities at its Misisi Project in the DRC, following the appointment of a new management team. The company has completed a successful in-country pre-drilling mobilization trip, engaging with key stakeholders and assessing local infrastructure. Avanti is in the process of finalizing service contracts and establishing supply chains, with exploration activities set to commence in Q1-2026. The project holds a significant inferred gold resource, and the company is focused on unlocking its potential through a disciplined and execution-focused approach.

More about Valorem Resources

Avanti Gold Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold exploration and development. The company is primarily engaged in the Misisi Project located in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), which hosts a significant inferred gold resource and offers substantial exploration potential.

Comstock Mining ( (LODE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On December 3, 2025, Comstock Inc. announced that its strategic investee, Bioleum Corporation, acquired most of RenFuel K2B IPCO AB’s assets, including patents and intellectual property, for $18.1 million. This acquisition aims to enhance Bioleum’s capabilities in converting woody biomass into renewable alternatives to petroleum, potentially accelerating the commercialization of these technologies globally and impacting the renewable energy industry.

An update from Nuix Ltd. ( (AU:NXL) ) is now available.

Nuix Ltd. has announced its acquisition of Linkurious, a Paris-based company specializing in graph-powered AI decision platforms. This strategic move aims to enhance Nuix’s capabilities in data visualization and graph technology, offering immediate value to its customers. The acquisition, valued at up to €20 million, will be funded through a combination of debt and cash reserves, with completion expected in early 2026. This integration is anticipated to create growth opportunities through expanded sales and distribution, leveraging Linkurious’s expertise and customer base across North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NXL) stock is a Buy with a A$4.35 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nuix Ltd. stock, see the AU:NXL Stock Forecast page.

More about Nuix Ltd.

Nuix Ltd. operates in the technology industry, specializing in data analytics and intelligence solutions. The company focuses on providing advanced software for data processing, investigation, and analysis, serving a global market with a particular emphasis on enabling insights from complex data at high speed and scale.

An update from VanEck Solana ETF ( (VSOL) ) is now available.

On November 30, 2025, MarketVector Indexes GmbH, the index sponsor and administrator for the MarketVectorTM Solana Benchmark Rate, announced changes to its constituent trading platforms. The company replaced Bitstamp and Bullish with Crypto.com and OKX, respectively, in the calculation of the Index, which now includes Coinbase, Crypto.com, Gemini, Kraken, and OKX. This adjustment in platform composition could influence the accuracy and reliability of the Index, impacting stakeholders who rely on it for market insights.

Canadian General Inv ( (TSE:CGI) ) has issued an announcement.

Canadian General Investments reported an unaudited net asset value per share of $80.73 as of November 30, 2025, with year-to-date and 12-month NAV returns of 18.2% and 13.9%, respectively. Despite these returns, they lag behind the benchmark S&P/TSX Composite Index. The company has reduced its leverage to 11.9% of net assets, and its share price closed at $45.50, reflecting a 15.4% year-to-date return. The announcement highlights CGI’s strategic sector allocations and top investments, which are crucial for stakeholders to assess the company’s market positioning and investment strategy.

data.description:

Cannabix Technologies ( (TSE:BLO) ) has provided an update.

Cannabix Technologies has secured a second sales agreement for its BreathLogix unmanned alcohol screening technology with a European maritime shipping customer. This agreement involves the delivery of an additional BreathLogix unit to enhance crew safety through pre-access breath alcohol testing, integrated with the cloud-based BreathLogix Connect platform for real-time alerts and data management. The device also features facial recognition for secure identification and is designed for deployment across various industries where safety is paramount.

Cannabix Technologies Inc. operates in the technology industry, specializing in the development of marijuana and alcohol breath devices. The company focuses on providing solutions for industries where operational safety is critical, such as maritime, mining, oil and gas, industrial, trucking, and warehousing.
